faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Hollis?
faqs.answer: Hollis has numerous parks, wooded areas, and residential properties with yards where ticks thrive. Ticks carry Lyme disease and other serious illnesses, making professional control essential for protecting your family and pets who spend time outdoors.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Hollis?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Hollis range from $125 to $325 depending on property size and infestation severity. We provide free inspections and customized treatment plans to fit your specific needs and budget.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Queens?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Queens typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in spring and fall. However, ticks can be active year-round during mild winters, so vigilance and preventative treatment are important throughout the year.

faqs.question: Are your tick treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We follow strict safety protocols and provide clear instructions for re-entry times after treatment to ensure complete safety.
